g.text: M1 | virtual-memory-sim-m1 | Single-Level Page Table, Address Translation, Demand Paging
M2 | virtual-memory-sim-m2 | TLB Caching, ASID Tagging, LRU Replacement
M3 | virtual-memory-sim-m3 | Multi-Level Page Tables, CR3 Register, On-Demand Allocation
M4 | virtual-memory-sim-m4 | Page Replacement (FIFO/LRU/Clock/Optimal), Swap Simulation, Thrashing Detection

text.tspan: TLB array fits in L1 cache

g.text: 1. Extract VPN and offset from VA
3. If TLB miss: Page table walk
